title: Chopping Stump & Firewood
subtitle: Logs, campfires, and the first hearth

tutorial.title: Firewood Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Make the fire that starts settlement life

objectives.label: Carve a Chopping Stump
substeps: Place or find a lone log.
Right-click the isolated log to carve it into a Chopping Stump.

objectives.label: Make Firewood
substeps: Use the Chopping Stump to split logs.
Firewood replaces charcoal in early campfire recipes.

objectives.label: Make a Campfire
substeps: Use Firewood in the campfire recipe.
Place the Campfire where the settlement should begin.
Right-click the Campfire to open the settlement flow.

pages.text: A lone log can be carved into a Chopping Stump by right-clicking it with an axe. The stump turns timber into Firewood, and Firewood makes the first Campfire practical before coal is common.
